title: Roughly Enough Config Screens (RECS)
description:
Adds configs screens for library mods such as Forge, and Framework.

As well as JEI.
body:
**Roughly Enough Config Screens** is a mod that adds config screens to mods that use certain libraries for their configs.

**RECS** supports the following mods/libraries:
- Framework
- Forge
- Just Enough Items

There is also an option on Forge to register vanilla's options screen as a config screen.
## Example:
![A config screen opened to Backpacked / Common](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VbyJLvvb/images/50b37f3874245c02a8067054f68e539285a681ef.png)
